allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({'title': d.get\('title'\), 'image': d.get\('thumbnail',{}\).get\('source'\), 'original': d.get\('originalimage',{}\).get\('source'\)}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('title:', d.get\('title'\)\); print\('image:', d.get\('thumbnail',{}\).get\('source','N/A'\)\); print\('original:', d.get\('originalimage',{}\).get\('source','N/A'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/panda.json'\)\); print\('OK:', d.get\('title'\), '| thumb:', d.get\('thumbnail',{}\).get\('source','N/A'\)[:80]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK:', d.get\('total_results'\), 'results, first ID:', d['photos'][0]['id'] if d.get\('photos'\) else 'none'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK, total:', d.get\('total_results'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['id'], '-', p['alt'][:60]\) for p in d.get\('photos',[]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total:', d.get\('total_results'\), '| error:', d.get\('status',''\)\)")
